name: Toggle Lan Switch to reset modbus
store values
prepare read
prepare write
readme
info:
Select a modbus server:
ip nummer of the device and add port number 502
example: 192.168.178.55:502

Do this for the modbus read node and for the 
modbus write node.

Also change in the prepare nodes if necessary
the fc value for special registers.

name: ems
func:

return [{ payload: ems1}]

name: vns
